feedback.text: In addition to the above, digital fairness includes the fact that purchased digital products cannot subsequently be rendered unusable by the seller. This is currently a common practice in the entertainment industry, such as films and video games. Purchased films can be easily deleted by the Platform Operator after purchase and, for video games, the servers necessary for their use can easily be switched off. Both could be easily solved, e.g. by making the download of purchased films mandatory and by requiring players to offer a possibility to play the game offline once the servers have been switched off.
